programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Sisters

programme.title: Movie: Chance at Romance
programme.desc: A woman thinks she has met the man of her dreams online. But after she's invited to an art show in his hometown she finds out she's been communicating with the man's son and that her dream guys isn't interested in a relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her 'boyfriend' for the week.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: A woman flies to Europe for some soul searching, and sight-seeing, with a friend. While there she encounters a handsome European playboy prince.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: The Office: The Deposition

programme.title: The Office: Dinner Party
programme.desc: Pam and Jim have run out of excuses and are forced to go to Jan and Michael's house for dinner. When Andy and Angela are also invited, Dwight's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: The Office: The Chair Model
programme.desc: Michael becomes obsessed with a woman shown in an office supply catalogue. Meanwhile, Kevin and Andy team up to win back their stolen parking spaces. They quickly end up in an all-out war with the bosses of the five business of the office park.

programme.title: The Office: Night Out
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight decide to surprise Ryan in New York for a night of clubbing. Meanwhile, the Scranton branch is upset when they find out they have to come in on a Saturday for Ryan's website project. Jim's plan to save them has unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Did I Stutter?

programme.title: The Office: Job Fair
programme.desc: Jim tries to land his biggest client ever with Andy and Kevin's help. Meanwhile, Michael sets up a booth at a local job fair being held at Pam's alma mater, to find the best and brightest for Dunder-Mifflin's summer internship.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby
programme.desc: Angela, sick of Michael's unreasonable demands, refuses to plan Toby's goodbye party, forcing him to turn to Phyllis for help. Meanwhile, Dwight and Meredith haze the new HR woman.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.desc: When a kidnapper dressed as a clown re-emerges in Boston after more than 20 years, the squad is struck with fear. Desperate for clues, they dig through files from the unsolved abductions of the haunting 1988 'Summer of the Clown.'

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let the Angels Commit
programme.desc: Much to the envy of her fellow doctors, Cristina scrubs in on the rare 'humpty dumpty' procedure before Alex questions his future medical specialty. Derek gets a surprise while George and Addison work with a pregnant woman with an unusual dilemma.

programme.title: The Closer: Next of Kin
programme.desc: Brenda finds herself transporting a robbery suspect in a recreational vehicle driven by her parents.

programme.title: The Closer: Controlled Burn
programme.desc: A massive fire breaks out in Griffith Park and an unidentified woman's body is found in the centre of the scene. Meanwhile, Brenda and Fritz are living in a small apartment and getting on each other's nerves.

programme.title: Major Crimes: #FindKaylaWeber
programme.desc: A professional baseball pitcher's daughter goes missing, and the Major Crimes team's investigation leads them to the very limits of the justice system. Rusty is put in an extremely awkward position as Slider approaches the last phase of his trial.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Penalty Phase
programme.desc: Sharon and the team track an unhinged killer making his own film with his victims as the stars as a new romance takes wing.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: A young woman and her three-year-old son are shot to death while driving through gang territory in the wrong colored car, and the gun used in the murder is quickly connected to the most troubling series of unsolved homicides in LAPD history.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: A killer is using online ads to find the perfect candidate for murder: men no one will notice are missing. Meanwhile, Jane discovers that keeping her pregnancy quiet will be a tough assignment.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: Gods, Guns and Government (Part 1)
programme.desc: We analyze the reasons for the raid of a bizarre religious compound in Waco, Texas in 1993, and look at what was happening inside the Branch Davidian compound.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: End of Days (Part 2)
programme.desc: The siege at Waco ended in a fiery battle that killed David Koresh, his followers, and his multiple wives and children. TV news crews and demonstrators watched in horror as the ranch went up in flames.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Love, Sex and Greed

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferrari Fix, Part 2/ 1917 REO
programme.desc: The crew pushes to finish the Ferrari F40 and get it sold. Costs rise when the $8000 windshield gets broken. Richard's luck turns when the 1967 Porsche 911S he buys turns out to be something better. Tom better get crankin' on a 1917 REO or he'll be fired.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: Bracket two race kicks off with sixteen new drivers, including No Prep King Champ Ryan Martin and Memphis leader JJ The Boss. A fresh section of road challenges every driver to put down his fast pass.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Turn It Up
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: A horrifying crash makes one racer fear his racing days are over and Chief and Shawn learn what it takes to win without the other's help for the first time.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Boosted to the Max
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to the 405's list, bringing with him a new car with scary potential. Working on his own, Shawn tries to prove to his son he has what it takes to climb the ranks.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Jumping the Shark-Pool
programme.desc: Chief introduces an idea to make the list even faster: The Shark Pool. Now, a hungry group of street racers will be showing up every week to take on #10. Doc and Monza battle. Farmtruck schools a shark pool racer regarding an old debt.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Boosted to the Max
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to the 405's list, bringing with him a new car with scary potential. Working on his own, Shawn tries to prove to his son he has what it takes to climb the ranks.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Jumping the Shark-Pool
programme.desc: Chief introduces an idea to make the list even faster: The Shark Pool. Now, a hungry group of street racers will be showing up every week to take on #10. Doc and Monza battle. Farmtruck schools a shark pool racer regarding an old debt.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Embrace the Suck
programme.desc: Terry, our Green Beret, is ambushed on vacation and tossed out of an airplane into the middle of the ocean in the Gulf of Mexico. Facing the threat of dehydration and freezing conditions, will Terry's training help him survive the challenge and find land?

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Volcano Nightmare
programme.desc: Jake, our former Navy SEAL, is ambushed and dumped atop a volcano in Iceland. Facing deadly avalanche fields, boiling mud pits and sulphuric geysers, Jake could lose more than the game when he makes a near-fatal error in the land of fire and ice.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Army Veteran Tom is captured, hooded, handcuffed and dropped on a volcano in the wilderness of Chile. He'll need all his bushcraft skills to scale glaciers, conquer an impenetrable jungle and brave the desolation as he races to find civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Arctic Disaster
programme.desc: Primitive skills expert and endurance athlete Matt is captured and dropped into chest-deep snow in the Arctic Circle. Wearing nothing but his buckskin shorts and sandals, he has to fight through a frozen swamp of snow to find his way back to civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Extreme Survival Instructor John is gassed by the guys at his dentist appointment, extracted to the Canyon lands of Utah and dropped into a 200 ft. crevasse. Forced to confront a devilish maze of claustrophobic dead end passages, can he make it out?

programme.title: Moonshiners: First Run
programme.desc: Tickle bootlegs at night, while Wayne comes up with an ingenious drop-off plan for his own bootleggers. Equipment failure threatens the production of Tim Smith's legal moonshine, and Josh and Bill finally begin their first run of strawberry brandy.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Blue Moonshine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill are forced back to their day jobs after their shine runs blue. Chico, under financial stress, makes a hard decision that could risk it all. Tickle struggles to keep Tim's old territory supplied. Mark and Jeff move their liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rival Shiners
programme.desc: Tim reaches a milestone with his first bottled batch of shine. Jeff and Mark suspect a rival in their territory. Chico takes a risk that could cost him everything. Josh and Bill's only hope at financing their shine operation is to consider bootlegging.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootlegging Blowups
programme.desc: Tim enlists Tickle's help to investigate his new still hand, Chico. Josh and Bill take on new risks as they try to stay alive in the moonshine game as bootleggers. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine War
programme.desc: Tickle goes undercover in Kentucky to find out what Chico has been up to. Josh and Bill hit the open road to bootleg shine at a music festival, but they soon hit a violent roadblock. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition with one shot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Firewater
programme.desc: Josh and Bill suffer the consequences of bootlegging. Darlene goes against her best instinct and lights up her still indoors. Jeff, Mark and Lance find their competition is still out there. Tim takes final measures to protect his legal shine business.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Aftershock
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark look to cash in on one final run of the season. Tickle and Chico's still site is compromised. Mike is desperate to complete his New Orleans order and turns to Darlene. Josh and Bill might get to sell some of their own liquor after all.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Drinks Nail Polish/ Ear Digger
programme.desc: Bertha has been drinking up to five bottles of nail polish every day for the past five years. Jamie can't stop digging in her ears.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/ Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them, practicing up to 12 hours a day. Meanwhile, Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation from the outside world.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Wears Diapers/ Eats Dryer Sheets
programme.desc: For Riley, there's nothing like the comfort of wearing a warm, wet diaper. She chooses to live as an adult baby to escape the stress of the real world. And Charmissa stuffs her bra with the dryer sheets she chews on for up to 10 hours a day.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Inflatables/ Butt Injection Addict
programme.desc: Mark has been addicted to his 15 inflatable pool toys, eating, sleeping, and bathing with them. Meanwhile, Karmello has been getting black market butt injections for the last three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Pony Play/ Addicted to Drinking Paint
programme.desc: A single mother of two has been addicted to drinking paint for nearly three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Extreme Hair/ Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her 10-pound locks. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bloomin' Bunions
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent's patient has feet that are so crooked her toes don't touch the floor, and Dr. Schaeffer meets a woman with behemoth bunions. Rachel has a toe crawling up her foot, and Dr. Haller has to get it back in line.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Melted Candle Wax Feet
programme.desc: Cindy is desperate to have Dr. Brad fix her stumpy foot and get back to skiing. Gregory has open wounds on both feet and hopes Dr. Ebonie can heal them. Glen's feet are split down the middle, and Dr. Brad is determined to find a solution to ease his pain.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Dropping Bombs

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.desc: Kardea hits the beach with friends for some fun in the sun and a summer-perfect picnic featuring a low country boil, fresh peach arugula salad and sparkling summer lemonade. For dessert there's frozen confetti vanilla whoopie pies.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: My Sweets!

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Insta-licious
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes picture-perfect dishes to share on social media, starting with a steakhouse burger and crispy home fries. She also gets roasted fennel with apple cider reduction and bananas foster upside-down cake ready for their close-up.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Big Apple Down South
programme.desc: Kardea Brown's friend from New York City is visiting, so Kardea's whipping up a meal that combines Big Apple classics and the best of the South. Her menu includes seafood pizza with local shrimp, Charleston tea and Big Apple crumb cheesecake.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Edge
programme.desc: The race begins to secure food and shelter before the snow flies. Heimo's family hunts for caribou, but a bear could stop them in their tracks. Tyler and Ashley work to pull in a winter's supply of salmon. Bob and Nancy face a hard truth about his future.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: The Seldens embark on a four-day trapping loop that could lead them through dangerous conditions. Heimo must compete with a pack of wolves to secure a moose for winter. The Lewis cabin is rehabbed, but the girls still have a lot to learn.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Dark Winter
programme.desc: It's the dead of winter and the Last Alaskans move through the icy Arctic. Heimo still needs a moose, while the Seldens embark on the next part of their trapline journey. One of the last of the Last Alaskans, 19-year-old Charlie Jagow, is introduced.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The sun returns, signalling late winter in ANWR. An unwelcome intruder threatens Tyler and Ashley's success. Heimo and Edna say a final goodbye to their oldest cabin, while Charlie meticulously builds his very first and reflects on his future in the bush.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Inside the Bowl: PBXII Star's Double TD

programme.desc: An Alaskan summer proves to be beneficial as the family uses the extra daylight to forge ahead. Atz Lee uses a helicopter to haul in vital equipment, Jane and Charlotte wrangle an angry nest of wasps, while Eivin makes way for an upgraded chicken coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Call of the Coyote
programme.desc: When rampaging moose threaten a family's source of food, the Raneys spring into action to secure their homestead. Then, the Raneys race to rescue an Arizona family stalked by ravenous coyotes and cattle.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: A Frontier Feast

programme.desc: What promises to be a relaxing trip to Santa Barbara instead opens old wounds for Dorit, Erika, Teddi and Kyle. After feeling judged as a mother, Lisa Rinna turns the tables on Denise, forcing her to examine her own history of risqué behaviour.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Mind Your P's and BBQ's
programme.desc: Garcelle is honoured for her work with a local charity, but her acceptance speech isn't charitable to one guest. The ladies feel mom-shamed when Denise shows up to Kyle's kid-friendly barbecue without her kid.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Until We Leave Again
programme.desc: Denise and Aaron's hasty departure from Kyle's barbecue leaves the other ladies confused and unsettled. Kyle helps Kim through a delicate medical procedure, while Lisa and Erika have a distinctively Beverly Hills 'procedure' of their own.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Black Ties and White Lines
programme.desc: Garcelle finds herself in a tough spot during a business meeting. Lisa questions Denise’s motives when Denise’s behaviour is filled with shades of grey. With Dorit’s help, Kyle throws a black and white charity gala full of familiar faces from years past.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Kiss and Tell All
programme.desc: Lisa invites the ladies on a glamorous Roman getaway. Denise tries to make nice with Erika, but gets an ice-cold shoulder instead. Garcelle digs into Sutton's past, while Brandi drops a bomb on Kyle and Teddi that turns the vacation into a nightmare.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Roman Rumors
programme.desc: Rumors about Denise begin to swirl and Lisa attempts to save their holiday from ruin. Teddi questions Denise about talking behind their backs, which leads to shocking revelations. Garcelle's bluntness hits a nerve. Kyle judges Dorit and Erika's fashion.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: There's No Place like Rome
programme.desc: The Rome getaway continues as the women process Brandi's claims against Denise. While Kyle and Dorit attempt to work through their constant clashes, Garcelle, Denise, Erika and Lisa tour the city in luxury Ferraris.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Orbs and Lightning Balls

programme.title: Haunted History: A Deadly Possession
programme.desc: A man experienced paranormal activity after purchasing an unassuming wine box and sold it online where it was bought by a museum director in the Midwest who experienced the same things.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Manson Murders
programme.desc: In 1969, Hollywood was at the centre of a brutal and sadistic killing spree. Charles Manson and his cult of followers killed more than half a dozen innocent people, two of which are believed to haunt a house on Cielo Drive.

programme.title: Haunted History: Lost Souls of Pennhurst
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, Pennhurst Asylum became overcrowded, which resulted in an overwhelmed staff and rampant abuse. It was finally shut down, but it is said the ghosts of patients and employees still roam the halls today.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Torso Murders
programme.desc: The Great Depression of the 1930s saw many of the poor move into shantytowns. One such shanty was terrorized by The Mad Butcher of Kingsbury Run, who was never identified or apprehended.

programme.title: Haunted History: Salem Witch Trials
programme.desc: In 1692, 19 innocent people were hanged and one was pressed to death for the practice of witchcraft. Today, Salem, Massachusetts is a town renowned for its numerous accounts of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Movie: Test Pilot
programme.desc: An aviator attempting a transcontinental flight record falls in love and loses his job.

programme.title: Movie: Forsaking All Others

programme.desc: A swarm of genetically altered fire ants use a passenger on an airplane as a host.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: NCIS: React
programme.desc: When Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter learns that her daughter has been kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring her home. Also, McGee's childhood friend is in town to assist the team with training.

programme.title: NCIS: Day in Court
programme.desc: In order to clear his name, a petty officer volunteers to be court martialed if NCIS agrees to conduct its own investigation after his murder case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant. Also, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: In the hopes of sparing a family further tragedy, the Secretary of the Navy calls on NCIS to help a sailor battling leukemia locate a bone marrow transplant. Also, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for the Thanksgiving holiday.

programme.title: NCIS: Spinning Wheel
programme.desc: After Ducky is attacked by a man claiming to have information about his half-brother who died decades ago, the team searches for the perpetrator. Also, with the holidays approaching, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Sister City
programme.desc: After a private jet's passengers and crew travelling from New Orleans to Washington, D.C., are lethally poisoned, all evidence points to the missing chef, Abby's brother, Luca. Gibbs and the team work in conjunction with Pride and the New Orleans team.

programme.title: NCIS: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury, the NCIS team uncovers the resurgence of an international human trafficking ring. Also, McGee hopes to spend the night at a colleague's home after a power outage.

programme.title: NCIS: Decompressed
programme.desc: When a deep sea diver is murdered on the job, his body and suspected coworkers must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days, leaving the team to complete an unorthodox investigation from outside the tank.

programme.title: NCIS: React
programme.desc: When Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter learns that her daughter has been kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring her home. Also, McGee's childhood friend is in town to assist the team with training.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Merry Evasion
programme.desc: The team searches for a motive when a senator's daughter is attacked. Meanwhile, Deeks and Nell partner up to help Sam and Callen bring the daughter to safety and Kensi receives the perfect holiday gift from one of her co-workers.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Allegiance
programme.desc: While in Afghanistan, Kensi and Granger join the team on a joint case when a federal agent in Los Angeles tied to Hawala, an ancient system of money transfer, is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: War Cries
programme.desc: When two private military contractors are murdered, the teams' investigation leads to a suspect who puts one of their own in serious danger. Meanwhile, Sam sets up Callen on a blind date.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Legacy
programme.desc: A student's death at an elite private school leads Goren and Eames to investigate a world where grades mean everything, kids live their lives online, and everyone has something to hide.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: When the decapitated, stabbed, and mutilated body of Kyle Jones is found in Maspeth Creek, the entire community is suspected when it becomes clear that he was not welcome in the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Last Rites
programme.desc: Logan's faith in the system is put to the test when a priest asks him to reinvestigate a 16-year-old triple homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Payback
programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies lead back to an unlikely individual. Voight confronts a key witness in the Bingham investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Saved
programme.desc: Voight witnesses the kidnapping of a young woman with a mysterious connection to his past. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Ruzek gets a tip that a grand jury has been summoned.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Allegiance
programme.desc: Halstead and Atwater go undercover to prevent military-grade weapons from hitting the street. Voight calls in a favor as a last-ditch effort to clear Olinsky's name for Bingham's murder.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Homecoming
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Intelligence seeks justice for Olinsky after he's stabbed in prison. Antonio's loyalty is tested when Woods looks to take down Voight once and for all.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: New Normal
programme.desc: Bad heroin is causing overdoses in Chicago, and Intelligence is a man down after Voight is suspended. Antonio takes charge but Ruzek undermines his authority.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Endings
programme.desc: In the concluding third part of a three-show crossover event, Intelligence races to find the man responsible for the high-rise fire. And for Halstead, the case is personal.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Politics get in the way as the team tries to rescue a teenage girl kidnapped by a robbery crew. Voight and Platt try to exonerate Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ride Along
programme.desc: A ride along goes awry, and Burgess must decide whether to follow Voight's advice or that of a new ally.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: While undercover, Ruzek discovers his father is working for a suspected drug dealer and is forced to ask whether his dad is involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trigger
programme.desc: Intelligence suspects the leader of a local mosque is behind the bombing of an Army recruitment station. After a second explosion, Voight urges Halstead to follow the facts and not let his time in the service cloud his judgement.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Chief of Hearts
programme.desc: Homer is completing his court-ordered community service when he befriends his supervisor, Chief Wiggum, by offering him a sandwich. Touched by the act of kindness, Wiggum assigns the other convicts unpleasant tasks, but allows Homer to join him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Squirt and the Whale
programme.desc: The Simpsons decide to embrace a cheaper, alternate source of energy by erecting a wind turbine in their backyard. When Homer realizes that some of the power is being directed to the local electric company, he decides to remove his home from the grid.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Judge Me Tender
programme.desc: When Moe discovers a hidden talent for judging contests, he is approached by a television agent to join the 'American Idol' judges' panel. Moe flies to Los Angeles where he tours the Fox lot and receives some sage career advice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: When Krusty the Clown is announced as the recipient of the Nobel Peace Prize, Homer invites Bart to accompany him on a trip to Oslo for the ceremony. Sensing that Lisa would feel left out, Marge surprises her with a retreat at performing arts camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Loan-a-Lisa
programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family a portion of his savings. Lisa invests in Nelson's new business venture, but realizes that his instant success might lure him away from the classroom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: MoneyBart
programme.desc: A visit by a Springfield Elementary alum-turned-Ivy-League student pushes Lisa to question her own go-getter attitude and re-evaluate the scope of her extracurricular activities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Simpson, This Isn't Your Life
programme.desc: When the Simpsons visit Marge's childhood home and discover a box of her old belongings, Lisa is surprised to learn that Marge was once a stellar A+ student. Meanwhile, Bart puts Nelson and his bullying ways in place and claims the title of School Bully.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fool Monty
programme.desc: Mr. Burns is distraught at the less-than-sensitive response to his news that he has only weeks to live. When he ends up at the Simpson's home, Marge and Homer decide it's payback time, while Lisa stands up for the old man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: When a pigeon flies through the Simpsons' home and suffers a broken wing, Bart makes it his duty to care for the bird and nurse it back to health. When the pigeon is ready to fly, Homer decides to enter it in a bird race.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis' Double Life
programme.desc: Dennis reveals he has a baby from his Wade Boggs layover in North Dakota. Mac suggests they pretend to be a couple and Frank wants to make the broad a 'decent' proposal b/c $1 million for sex is indecent.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Makes Paddy’s Great Again
programme.desc: Meet Cindy, the new, ethnically diverse female member of the gang who can successfully pull off scams. Everything is working until Mac introduces a new member: a life-like sex doll that looks exactly like Dennis.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Escapes
programme.desc: To boost productivity, Dee hires an at-home 'Escape Room Experience' service to come to Dennis and Mac’s apartment.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Beats Boggs: Ladies Reboot
programme.desc: To one-up the guys, Dee has organized an 'all-female reboot' of the Wade Boggs challenge on a first-of-its-kind, all-female flight headed to L.A. for the women’s march.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer get a handle on their dogs to maintain their happy households.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Kelly and Hyrum Lai always knew their picture-perfect life together would include a dog, but early on their Lab puppy Holly began displaying disturbing behaviour.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Dane at a Time
programme.desc: This week on The Incredible Dr. Pol, Dr. Pol adds a Great Dane puppy to the Pol Pack!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Apocalypse Cow
programme.desc: Dr. Pol stays busy helping a feisty cow with a stinky foot problem, a down-cow taking a treatment that could kill it and Buddy, the Shih Tzu with a bulging eye who's seen better days.

programme.title: Battle for the Pride
programme.desc: Follow a pride of lions in Botswana to discover the brutal realities of family life in the wild.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Amazon Dungeon
programme.desc: An infamous prison in the Amazon and a deserted military facility in the remote English countryside contain a haunting and deadly past; experts investigate the secrets of these remarkable places to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of The Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore seven ancient pyramids from around the world; as experts explore their lost labyrinths and alien relics, they discover unexplained connections between cultures thousands of miles and years apart.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Rome
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological methods help experts unearth the dark secrets hidden at seven wonders of ancient Rome. What they find challenges everything we know about this once-mighty empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Modern Wonders of America
programme.desc: The seven engineering marvels that are regarded as the modern wonders of America set the benchmark for structural innovation, and now investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: 20-year old Justin Newman lands a great job in construction, but when he disappears on the day his new boss is found brutally murdered, a nation-wide search for Justin uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Friend of the Devil
programme.desc: Within a month, four men in Orange County are brutally stabbed by a mysterious man. No one makes a connection to a gruesome double murder of a mother and son two months earlier, except the man sitting in prison for killing his own family.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: The Perfect Suspect: Every Step You Take
programme.desc: Shortly after 30-year old Katrina Smith vanishes, investigators discover her abandoned car, as well as security footage of a mysterious stranger walking alone the night she went missing. Soon, secret lives will be unlocked and suspects will emerge.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Closer Than You Think
programme.desc: Candiace Person is murdered in her home, and Atlanta Homicide detectives uncover evidence that her killer meticulously stalked her prior to her death. Now, detectives have to turn the tables and stalk this dangerous killer on the loose.

programme.title: Time Is Running Out
programme.desc: A series of terrifying 911 calls from a young mother in grave danger send police into a tailspin as they try to find and save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Closer Than You Think
programme.desc: Candiace Person is murdered in her home, and Atlanta Homicide detectives uncover evidence that her killer meticulously stalked her prior to her death. Now, detectives have to turn the tables and stalk this dangerous killer on the loose.

programme.title: Time Is Running Out
programme.desc: A series of terrifying 911 calls from a young mother in grave danger send police into a tailspin as they try to find and save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Blinded From the Truth
programme.desc: All Debra Hartmann desired was a life of luxury. She seemed to have it all: fur coats, fancy car, and a boyfriend. There is only one thing getting in her way of the perfect life: her husband.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: The Price of Greed
programme.desc: Betty Lou Lazarra's stunning looks have always taken her far in life. But when this single mom meets wealthy businessman, Al Haber, she won't rest on her appearance alone.Betty Lou's stepkids discover the hard way just how determined and evil she can be.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Torched Heart
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 saying an intruder just entered her home and shot her husband. When the victim, a local fire chief, dies from his injuries, the first responder community works tirelessly to find out who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: As beautiful young women continue to disappear out of their Kansas City area apartments, police piece together evidence that the terrifying crimes are all connected.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Burning Season
programme.desc: Decorated Detective Debbie Harris is put to the ultimate test when she's called in to investigate a six-alarm fire with all of the the case evidence up in flames.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: The Perfect Family
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania family was brutally murdered in their home, which shocked their community for years to come.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blood Red Sun
programme.desc: The most violent night in the history of Anchorage, Alaska leaves seven dead - including four teens. And, the small police department is virtually overwhelmed by the string of shootings until clues lead them to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Preserving a Passion That's 'In-Tents'
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger
programme.desc: In Orwigsburg, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they have ever seen. This dangerous demolition demands the best of everyone.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving the Cabin That Saved the Company
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work to salvage a cabin that saved their business. It takes a variety of repairs to bring it back to life, but once it's up, Katherine has the best surprise of all. Later, Mark's pal Eddie makes a lamp out of reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.desc: Alton Brown prepares a chiffon cupcake.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I
programme.desc: Prepare America's most ubiquitous of bar foods, Buffalo chicken wings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Alton breaks out the cast iron and uses his hearth and grill to whip up good eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew visits Memphis and makes stops at some of the city's most beloved barbecue joints. Then, he drops by one of America's most iconic soul food restaurants and visits a joint where Italian and Southern comfort food are combined.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cincinnati
programme.desc: Andrew celebrates the can't-miss local favorites of Cincinnati, including pork schnitzel, goetta and Cincinnati chili.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.desc: Freddy and Pip rush to deliver Valentines to the babies they've delivered to make it back in time for the Valentine's Day Party; Freddy, Pip and K.C. try to get a shy turtle out of her shell.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: My Huggy Valentine / Dusty Bear
programme.desc: Doc received a stuffed heart named Val for Valentine’s Day, she brings her to life and everyone loves her. Doc finds Donny’s favorite Teddy Bear in a closet and diagnoses Teddy B with a case of the Dusty-Musties, which is making Donny sneeze.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry and the Bad Girl
programme.desc: A gang of artists is spray-painting graffiti all over Swellview. While confronting them, Kid Danger is tempted by a cute girl in the gang, forcing him to choose between her and Captain Man.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Birthday Girl Down
programme.desc: Henry is not invited to a birthday party because he was wrongfully accused of throwing the birthday girl off the roof the previous year.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Adventures in Supersitting
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max Thunderman seem to be regular teenage twins, but they're in a family of superheroes. Phoebe strives to be normal and use her powers for good, but Max embraces the dark side.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Dinner Party
programme.desc: Max plans to sabotage dinner when Phoebe invites her crush's family over in order to impress them, but when an unexpected guest arrives, Phoebe and Max have to work together to keep the evening from turning into a disaster.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Report Card
programme.desc: After changing the grades on his report card and being moved into an advanced class, Max competes against Phoebe in the Math Bowl. Meanwhile, Hank, Nora and Billy try to catch the elusive newspaper thief.

programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Danger Force: Chapa's Crush
programme.desc: When Chapa's distraction with a crush causes the Danger Force to fail a mission, the gang bust find her obsession to get her back to her normal self.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Fairy Quite Contrary/ Nectar of the Odds
programme.desc: Timmy notices that the rich kid in school is always ahead; Timmy opens a lemonade stand.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Christmas Everyday
programme.desc: The globe is put into gridlock after Timmy wishes for 365 days of Christmas a year.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Laughing Matter/ No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box
programme.desc: When the health inspector comes, Krabs tries to get the joint up to code.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy IV/ Doing Time
programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are eating when Mermaid Man accidentally drops his belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Paper Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Spongebob made an extra special valentine for his best friend, Patrick Starfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Scaredy Pants/ I Was a Teenage Gary
programme.desc: Bob is determined to scare everyone at the Halloween party; Bob becomes a snail.

programme.title: It's Pony: Annieversary/ Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Annie wonders why Pony is celebrating. And, Pony gets to go to school after being named class pet.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Legend of Boo-Kini Bottom
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Bikini Bottom, and the Flying Dutchman is going to make sure everyone's scared, even SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Invasion/ Idiot Sauce
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret formula in his home, it's up to Gary to protect it from Plankton. When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick convince Mr. Krabs to join in a friendly board game of 'Treasure Hunt.'

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
programme.desc: Plankton gets all of Bikini Bottom's residents on Santa's 'naughty' list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Handemonium/ Breakin'
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his first break.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece/ Whelk Attack
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab. Giant sea whelks terrorize the folks of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Merry Wishmas!
programme.desc: When Timmy doesn't get what he wants for Christmas he simply wishes for it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Terrible Twosome/ App Trap
programme.desc: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof's terrible twos. Timmy wishes up the world's coolest smartphone. The phone has everything but it soon starts to take over Timmy's life.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Close Encounters of the Doomed Kind/ Golden Retriever
programme.desc: Dudley and Keswick manage to make contact with aliens, but then Snaptrap commanders the alien ship to wreak havoc on Petropolis with the high tech weapons.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Return of the Nanobots
programme.desc: Jimmy's attempts to update the Nanobots lead to a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Brobot/ The Big Pinch
programme.desc: Jimmy constructs the perfect little brother; Jimmy brings Thomas Edison to the present.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Deadly Venom
programme.desc: Karai is brainwashed and starts hunting the Turtles.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: End of the Road
programme.desc: Zoey tries to convince Coral Harbor to switch from cars to Morph-X bikes, and Blaze executes an evil plan.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Digital Deception
programme.desc: Ravi is shocked by the evil Roxy when she comes to his rescue, leaving him to wonder if there's still some good left in her.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: War and Pizza/ Newsworthy
programme.desc: The Turtles help April throw a not-so-happy birthday party. An anchor man turned mutant-worm used to report the news, now he's making headline.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
