programme.title: Toon Bops: Miranda the Panda Bear
programme.desc: Miranda the Panda is a curious and fun-loving panda bear who likes to climb, jump and dance-along.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Small Wonder/ Dino Check-up Hiccup
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moth on the Moon/ Fly Me to the Moon
programme.desc: A crystal has hatched a new villain on the moon; Gekko confiscates Luna Girl and Motsuki's powers.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Splat Monster
programme.desc: Teeny-Weeny Ninjalino turns into the Splat Monster and traps the PJ Masks on Mystery Mountain. While they are trapped, Night Ninja uses the Splat Monster to take over the night.

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Out of the Box/ Run Down Race Car
programme.desc: Doc's Jack-in-the-Box patient is scared about getting a check-up until Doc reassures him that his dad will be with him the whole time. Donny's toy race care loses a race for the first time; Doc gives him a check up and sees his batteries need charging.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Itty Bitty Bess Takes Flight/ Boxed In
programme.desc: Doc and the toys help a tiny tin airplane pilot named Bess get back into shape after her joints become rusty. Also, Doc and the toys invite a beautiful Flamenco dancer doll to their McStuffins toy ball to help her overcome her fear of being outside.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: My Bobby Valentine/ Musical Mission Mishap
programme.desc: Ana is excited to give Bob his favorite candy for Valentine's Day, but when every store is sold out, Bingo and Rolly must track down the special holiday treat. Bob surprises Ana by winning a walk-on role in 'Pups: The Musical!'

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry the Man-Beast
programme.desc: Henry's got a big date, but things don't go quite as planned after he's accidentally exposed to a strange device in the Man Cave.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Henry and Ray have to deal with an especially annoying new villain, the Spoiler. Piper is pushed to her limits as she tries to join a popular Captain Man fan club.

programme.title: Henry Danger: My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: When Henry's crush goes on a Valentine's date with someone else, Schoz provides an android to make her jealous. Ray has an unpleasant date with one of Henry's teachers.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebe vs. Max
programme.desc: After Max pranks Phoebe on Picture Day, a prank war between them gets out of hand. Meanwhile, Hank and Barb try a new parenting style to get Billy and Nora to do their share of chores.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Weird Science Fair
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max let an old rivalry get carried away while helping Billy and Nora with their school science fair projects. Meanwhile, Barb tries to catch Hank in the act after he copies her notes in book club.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Weekend Guest
programme.desc: Max performs an experiment on the Class plant Phoebe brings home for the weekend, and it keeps growing until it threatens to take over the house.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: A surprise from Schowz's mom might cause Mika to fail her test on not snitching.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Old Parent
programme.desc: Poof finally becomes a fairy godparent. Unfortunately, it's to Mrs. Crocker.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: City Slickers/ Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Lori and Lincoln visit the city. Lori struggles to be a city girl and Lincoln finds Ronnie Anne has changed.

programme.title: The Loud House: Net Gains/ Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Lynn desperately wants to win a basketball championship but gets drafted onto a terrible team. Mom and Dad are sick of waiting in the long bathroom line so they decide to build a secret bathroom.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hall Monitor/ Jellyfish Jam
programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Ghost of Plankton/ Whirlybrains
programme.desc: Plankton becomes a ghost to steal the secret formula, but requires a few lessons from the Flying Dutchman. SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad: flying your own brain like a tiny drone.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets on the wrong bus, he finds himself lost in an unfamiliar and mysterious part of the sea called Rock Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: That Sinking Feeling/ Karate Star
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation. Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Clowning Around/ Bully for You
programme.desc: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in the school play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps him stand up to the bullies.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Wild Weekend/ For Whom the Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Alvin begs Dave to spend a weekend alone with him. A hypnotist accidentally turns Simon into a bumbling fool before an academic contest.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dimmsdale Tales
programme.desc: Dad takes the Squirrely Scouts on a camping trip and forgets all the supplies. Timmy tries to make the most of their trip by telling a collection of scary stories around a campfire.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Talkin' Trash/ Timmy TV
programme.desc: Cosmo's magic trash bags invite disaster; Fairy World is watching Timmy TV.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard: Wild Mike's Dance Party
programme.desc: When Otis unlocks Wild Mike for an impromptu party, Wild Mike accidentally dances off the farm and ends up being captured by the producers of American Barnstand.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Granny Baby / Time Is Money
programme.desc: Jimmy's Granny comes to stay while Judy and Hugh are away; Jimmy's investment tip has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: I Dream of Jimmy/ Raise the Oozy Scab
programme.desc: Carl loses sleep over a recurring nightmare; Jimmy and Cindy collaborate on a project.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: iHear/ Switch Witch
programme.desc: Alvin gets a device that lets him listen in on everyone's conversations. When the kids' Halloween candy disappears, they're sure the culprit is 'Switch Witch.'

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Double Trouble/ Liar Liar
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's lab and accidentally clones himself; Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles get whisked through time by apprentice Time Master Renet, and they must all work together to defeat the evil Time Master Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Yokai
programme.desc: The Turtles are accidentally transported to the past where they cross paths with a familiar ninja clan.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Taking Care of Business
programme.desc: Devon finds it difficult to balance a new job he took to impress his dad and the duties of being the Red Power Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Hangar Heist
programme.desc: Nate uses a captured Gigadrone to develop new technology, and Devon struggles with trusting his team.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fast and the Furriest/ Mascot Melee
programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.title: It's Pony: Pet Pony/ Dog Day
programme.desc: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears

programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 3: Take Back the Falls
programme.desc: Ford discovers Bill's true motives and then a final confrontation with Bill leads to the Pines family's ultimate fate and greatest sacrifice.

programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing
programme.desc: The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the 'friends of animals club,' Dusty the 'TV club,' Herman the 'wrestling club' and Chance the 'journalism club.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dear Me
programme.desc: The kids have to write letters to themselves 20 years in the future. Meanwhile, the gang pulls off hilarious pranks that include a wild skunk scaring a babysitter, and a target who believes a 3-D printer can print real food.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke

programme.desc: Shawn's old high school pal comes to town for a visit and Marlon questions his intentions.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Pops' Last Hurrah
programme.desc: Believing that Pops is dying, the boys arrange for him to meet his favorite entertainment.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: I Was En Vogue's Love Slave
programme.desc: Marlon meets his dream girl's singing group, En Vogue.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Can I Get a Witness?
programme.desc: Marlon and his family are in danger when Marlon is asked to testify against a notorious criminal.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Ted's Revenge
programme.desc: Shawn has trouble with the Internal Revenue Agency Service, thanks to his old enemy Ted, who seeks vengeance against him.

programme.title: Martin: Really, Gina Is Not My Lover
programme.desc: Gina goes to the dentist and Martin wants to win an award at his high school reunion.

programme.title: Martin: Got to Be There
programme.desc: Martin drives 500 miles to try and catch Gina being unfaithful on a business trip.

programme.title: Martin: Beat It
programme.desc: Martin gets frustrated from the constant interruptions when he invites a group over to watch a boxing match.

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You
programme.desc: Martin agrees to host a baby shower for Gina's expecting friend at his apartment.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: A Night at the Oprah
programme.desc: The Banks family appears on 'The Oprah Winfrey Show' and their bickering causes an uproar.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Asses to Ashes
programme.desc: Judge Carl Robertson defeats Philip in the election for State Superior Court Judge.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Cold War
programme.desc: Vivian quarantines Will and Carlton in the backyard pool house when they both get colds.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mommy Nearest
programme.desc: Will tries to tell his mother he does not want to return to Philadelphia after graduation.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Winner Takes Off
programme.desc: Geoffrey quits his job with the family after believing he won the big lottery.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Robbing the Banks
programme.desc: Valuable items begin to disappear after Will convinces Philip to hire a former convict.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bundle of Joy
programme.desc: The family fantasizes about what their lives will be like after the baby is born.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: When Monique refuses to have sex until she's married, Will stages a mock wedding ceremony.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: The Remodel
programme.desc: When Jay wants the garage remodelled, Michael and Jr. try to do the job themselves.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Michael Joins a Gym
programme.desc: When Michael is unable to fit into his old jeans, he goes on an extreme fitness regimen.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Celibacy
programme.desc: Jay tells Michael that their love life will be better if they are celibate for six months.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jr.'s Cartoon
programme.desc: Jr. wins a competition for his cartoon that catches the attention of ABC.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Michael's Sandwich
programme.desc: Michael tries to prepare his signature masterpiece sandwich to bring on a flight.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Graduation, Part 1
programme.desc: It's graduation day for Jr., but Michael and Jay are very concerned about his future.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: All in the Family Feud
programme.desc: The Williams are chosen for a TV game show, but Pops and Shawn bring in Dee to replace Marlon.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Raging Marlon
programme.desc: Marlon inadvertently challenges a professional boxer to a fight.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: A Ring by Spring
programme.desc: A business woman fears her boyfriend will propose after a fortuneteller predicts she will become engaged.

programme.title: Movie: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: An aspiring chef tries to win a food-truck competition, while her competitor tries to win her heart.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Romance and Chocolate
programme.desc: A Manhattan chocolatier heads to Belgium with plans to close up her family's chocolate shop, but gets swept up in a competition to become the Belgian Royal family's chocolatier. The potential for love might be the only thing to shake her focus.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Actor
programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father
programme.desc: Blanche and Rose plan a nice dinner at the house for Dorothy and her new boyfriend, who she later learns is a priest. She later gets another shock when she learns he plans to leave the church.

programme.title: Frasier: Love Stinks
programme.desc: Roz meets the perfect guy but has difficulty accepting his profession as a garbage man.

programme.title: Frasier: Room Full of Heroes
programme.desc: Frasier throws a Halloween party and invites everyone to come as their favourite hero.

programme.title: Frasier: Bla-Z-Boy
programme.desc: Frasier chafes at the notion that he and his father are like an old married couple.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Hundredth Episode
programme.desc: While toasting his 2000th radio show, Frasier discovers his collection is short one tape.

programme.title: Frasier: Sharing Kirby
programme.desc: Wine connoisseurs Frasier and Niles vie for control of the incompetent teenager, Kirby.

programme.title: Frasier: Junior Agent
programme.desc: Frasier feels the heat when a younger, more aggressive psychiatrist is out-rating him.

programme.title: Reba: As Is
programme.desc: When Barbra Jean feels neglected she finds companionship from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Reba: And God Created Van
programme.desc: Reba meets the new minister after Cheyenne asks for help in getting Van to attend church.

programme.title: Reba: The Best Lil' Haunted House in Texas
programme.desc: Van grows jealous when Cheyenne spends a lot of time with her handsome sponsor.

programme.title: Reba: Have Your Cake
programme.desc: Realizing that Barbra Jean has taken up eating as a hobby and gained quite a bit of weight as a result, Brock consults Reba on how best to handle Barbra Jean's food addiction.

programme.title: Reba: Grannies Gone Wild
programme.desc: When Cheyenne turns down Brock's offer to intern at his dental office, the family learns she no longer wants to become a dentist and plans to devote her life to helping people. Barbra Jean attempts to get selected for jury duty.

programme.title: Reba: Invasion
programme.desc: After a miscommunication sends Barbra Jean to her brother Bryan's house in Lubbock for Thanksgiving, Bryan, who believes Reba has been sending him love letters, mistakenly ends up on Reba's doorstep for the holiday.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her. They find their love of skating goes far beyond the ice.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Take Two
programme.desc: A woman moved to Los Angeles with dreams of becoming a writer. Years later, she's the producer of a reality show based around weddings. While filming on site, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who is cast as the groom-to-be, and it sets her world on fire.

programme.title: Movie: Follow Me to Daisy Hills
programme.desc: A woman is put in an awkward situation when her father asks for help with the family business from her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Band in China
programme.desc: Randy sees an opportunity for Tegridy in China.

programme.title: South Park: SHOTS!!!
programme.desc: Randy celebrates the success of Tegridy Farms while Cartman refuses to get a shot.

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: South Park: Season Finale
programme.desc: The citizens of South Park have had enough of Randy and Tegridy Farms and they just want to lock him up.

programme.title: South Park: The Pandemic Special
programme.desc: The on-going Pandemic presents endless challenges to the citizens of South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.desc: The new President-elect pays a visit to his hometown.

programme.desc: Cartman is certain that Butters is trying to steal his girlfriend.

programme.desc: Cartman finally understands why Heidi wants to get him to Mars.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: From a Whisper to a Scream
programme.desc: Cristina has a terrible crisis of conscience about her deceptive teamwork with Burke as a traumatic car accident fills the ER. Meanwhile, Izzie pushes the boundaries of her probation.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Don't Stand So Close to Me
programme.desc: Recent events strain Burke and Cristina's relationship while Meredith's half-sister, Molly, is admitted to the hospital. Elsewhere, Mark and Derek must work together when two close-knit brothers seek medical help.

programme.title: The Closer: Live Wire
programme.desc: When a reporter alerts Brenda to a crime scene, Priority Homicide and the FBI fight for jurisdiction over the case. Meanwhile, interpersonal relationships on the squad force Brenda into a corner.

programme.title: The Closer: Dial 'M' for Provenza
programme.desc: Things spiral out of control when Provenza goes undercover to look into a murder for hire.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Present Tense
programme.desc: The Major Crimes squad investigates the mysterious disappearance of a teenage girl, who vanished while volunteering at a homeless shelter. Meanwhile Buzz cracks open the decades old cold case file on the murder of his father and uncle.

programme.title: Major Crimes: N.S.F.W.
programme.desc: The murder of a Sex Crimes detective leads Major Crimes into the world of barely legal porn, where they find rampant drug use and questionable ethics. Meanwhile, Rusty's biological mother, Sharon Beck returns with some surprising news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gumshoe
programme.desc: The squad must work together with a private investigator when a clothing designer is found poisoned and his wife reported missing. Jane asks Maura to teach Angela to better handle her finances.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Plain View
programme.desc: Jane and the squad team up with another detective who believes they are both hunting for the same killer. Meanwhile, after discovering her identity has been stolen, Maura enlists the help of Angela to find the culprit.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Spring Break From Hell
programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Killer Cookout

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Thrill of the Hunt

programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received
programme.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge each other to step outside their comfort zone and try something new. Mitch and Cam's wedding is getting too big and costly, so they resort to selling a couple of their prized possessions.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Love a Charade

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Mime Over Matter
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Kourtney must decide whether to take a trip to Egypt without her kids. Meanwhile Khloé recognizes that the stress of dealing with six kids is weighing on Kris, so she hires a mime to cheer her mom up.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Bun in the Oven
programme.desc: Khloé has some big news to share with her family, but her strained relationship with Corey threatens to overshadow the big reveal. Meanwhile, Kris gets a complex about her sagging earlobes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Scott's behavior takes a turn for the worse after learning that Kourtney officially has a boyfriend. Meanwhile Kourtney struggles to find her career passion, and Kris comes up with a creative way to preserve her memory long after she's gone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Tangled Web
programme.desc: Kim fears for her surrogate's safety when sources begin exposing her personal information, Kris keeps a watchful eye on Scott during Fashion Week, and Kourtney deals with a scary infestation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris Jenner's Legacy
programme.desc: When Scott realizes that the girls know very little about Kris's history, he sets out to make her a commemorative legacy video. Meanwhile Kendall's anxiety strikes again right before Milan Fashion week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trimester Trouble
programme.desc: Khloé attempts to keep her pregnancy a secret while dealing with some complications, Kourtney questions whether she's done having kids, and Kris debuts a loud new hairdo.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Gender Reveal
programme.desc: The girls take one last sister getaway to San Francisco before their babies arrive, but they quickly get fed up with Kourtney's bad attitude. Kim wants to include her family is the surrogacy process, and Khloe anxiously awaits to hear her baby's gender.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Photo Shoot Dispute
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloé. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Art of the Prank
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé try to get to the root of Kourtney's bad attitude, which ignites another huge fight between the girls.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Drop Dead Gorgeous
programme.desc: Kris worries that pregnant Khloé is taking her healthy lifestyle too far and putting her baby at risk. Meanwhile Scott's business trip to Miami takes a wild turn, jeopardizing an exciting new business venture.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Beef Battle
programme.desc: Four meat-loving chefs step into Flavortown to compete in three beef-inspired rounds. First, Guy Fieri asks them to shop for, prepare and plate their best beef burger, and then he gives them scratch-off budget cards with the amount they can spend.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: World Fusion
programme.desc: Guy brings in chefs representing cuisines from all around the world to team up and fuse their cultures' flavours together. The teams create their best spicy dish to see which combination of cultures is the tastiest.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: $12 Meal Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri pushes the culinary limits of four Flavortown rookies by challenging them to cook a day's worth of meals with a budget of just $12 for each round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clearance Wars
programme.desc: Everything in Flavortown must go, and Guy Fieri has the perfect solution: a clearance war! He gives four chefs a list of clearance items that they must use over the course of the competition.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grocery Rush
programme.desc: Guy gives the chefs three turbo-charged games with only 15-20 minutes to shop, cook and plate, making breakfast, lunch and dinner over three short rounds.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Meat on the Street

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Free Samples

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hunting the Hunters
programme.desc: Officers Adam Cheney and Geoff Pushee run into an aggressive and angry hunter while investigating a road hunting complaint.

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Inside the Bowl: PBXIII Rory
North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wild Home Invasion
programme.desc: Time is running out when an injured hiker must be rescued from Mount Chocorua, and on Squam Lake an illegal fishing tournament must be handled. A pesky bear finds its way inside a home in search of food, and a team is deployed to search for a young hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Wild Home Invasion
programme.desc: Time is running out when an injured hiker must be rescued from Mount Chocorua, and on Squam Lake an illegal fishing tournament must be handled. A pesky bear finds its way inside a home in search of food, and a team is deployed to search for a young hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Long Shot
programme.desc: Simmons, Parker and Robertson catch sportsmen who fired from inside their truck. Spahr leads the search for a missing elderly woman in York County. The dive team is mustered to search for two duck hunters presumed drowned in the Sebasticook River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Antlers and Antics
programme.desc: Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder chase down a fleeing ATV. Warden Pelkey sends his K9 in search of evidence over a suspiciously shot moose. Warden MacCabe wrangles a tangled great blue heron.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed It and Reap
programme.desc: Harvest season is the game wardens' busiest time. Warden Dudley helps an Amish family save their corn crop from a bear. Wardens Carter and McBrine hunt for a man hiding out in a cabin. Sergeant Thrasher searches for an illegal marijuana crop grower.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Excuses, Excuses
programme.desc: Hunting season heats up as Warden Herring calls in the air wing to track illegal activity on a game preserve. Warden Blanchard catches an intentional violator red-handed. Wardens Carter and McBrine execute a search warrant on a known poacher.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Spotted Pampered Pups
programme.desc: A shy Cavalier King Charles Spaniel is coaxed out of her shell by her peppy aunt.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scary Tails
programme.desc: Jackson works with a cat, Skylar, who's literally afraid of her tail. Then, he meets a pair of guardians whose cat is constantly knocking things over, climbing up the window screens and spontaneously attacking. Finally, a disabled cat inspires people.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Growing Pains
programme.desc: Young giraffe mum Tula gives birth, while both the penguin chicks and a silvery gibbon baby must face their fears as they grow up.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Levitating Lighthouse
programme.desc: A couple dreams of a lighthouse treehouse atop a seawall along the coast of Washington. Pete is challenged by the property's steep grade and must problem solve, delivering all of his materials, and even his crew, to the site via barge and boat only.

programme.title: Tanked!: Crazy Client Requests
programme.desc: Some never before seen footage of the ATM crew getting a little crazy while making their clients' outrageous tank dreams a reality.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Healing Hearts

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Broken Home
programme.desc: Tia and Matt are heartbroken when they are called to pick up some dogs whose owner has recently passed away. Then, a potential adopter is looking for a dog that will thrive in a B&B.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust

programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.title: Movie: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: A newly deceased couple tries to drive away the obnoxious new owners of their house, enlisting the help of a 'bio-exorcist' called Beetlejuice.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Condo Brings Family Together
programme.desc: Mina and Karen work to gut a condo and make it a dream home for Mina's sister and her two girls. The remodel includes personalized touches, including a special mural made by Mina, Karen and the kids.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chelsea Vibes in Old Southside
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are in Old Southside, but this time they're working in a transitional area. They've purchased a duplex of townhomes that will need both sides renovated, but for now they're focusing on the left side.

programme.title: Good Bones: Fountain Square Flashback
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are headed back to their old stomping grounds in the Fountain Square neighborhood, to tackle a charming old bungalow. They bought the property from a couple who lived there for more than 50 years and knew it would be taken care of.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Greenwich Village Townhome
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Old Southside renovating the right side of their duplex townhomes. Karen also has a major announcement about her position within the company and the ramifications of that change come to light sooner than expected.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Gearing Up for Georgia
programme.desc: A couple has lived in their California home for 11 years, but now they've received a dream job offer in Georgia, where they have family ties. With their house under contract, these perfectionists must find a home that meets their needs in two days.

programme.title: House Hunters: Settling Down in New Orleans
programme.desc: While a former Marine is not willing to compromise on what she wants for a home in her adopted city of New Orleans, her Navy buddy is along for the ride to make sure she doesn't fixate on minor details and overlook the big picture.

programme.title: One Week To Sell: discovery+ 1st Look: An Island is Forever
programme.desc: Watch this special sneak peek as Taylor Spellman gets a century-old house primed, prepped and ready for market. Using a mix of high and low design tips, she modernizes the older home to give it a hip new look that appeals to young families.

programme.title: One Week To Sell: discovery+ 1st Look: 80's Cookie Cutter to Custom
programme.desc: Watch this special sneak peek as Taylor Spellman tackles a four bedroom home from the 1980s in Linden, New Jersey. She hopes to add visual interest to the boring, cookie-cutter rooms by creating custom pieces and using bold pops of color.

programme.title: House Hunters: No House No Wedding in New Jersey
programme.desc: A man wants to honor his and his fiancee's Armenian culture and purchase a house before they marry. They both like the vibe of pricy, upscale neighborhoods, but his hard-bargaining ways have stretched their house hunt and put their wedding plans on hold.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Getting Comfortable in London
programme.desc: A job opportunity leads a couple to relocate and search for a home in London. He wants a place that's located in Central London and wants to save money for travel, but she's anxious about the move and wants a larger home for visiting family and friends.

programme.title: House Hunters: Every Dog Has Its Day in Denver
programme.desc: Newlyweds agree they need to buy their first home in Denver, Colorado before they can adopt dogs again, but she insists on move-in ready, while he wants as many projects as possible.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Paradise Now in Vieques
programme.desc: Busy health care professionals look to buy their first home in Vieques, Puerto Rico. They want plenty of outdoor space for their young son and she prefers to be near restaurants and the nightlife, but he's looking for something more remote and low-key.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Aloha Florida

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Better Than New
programme.desc: A couple wants to sell their home and move to the mountains, but they can't compete with new homes in their neighborhood. Lyndsay and Leslie update the house with a rustic style so it can contend with the new construction and attract high-end buyers.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Empty Nest Turned Family Retreat
programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Split-level Struggle
programme.desc: Before a couple can buy their dream home, they must sell their outdated split level, and they're having trouble getting buyers in the door. Lyndsay and Leslie bring the home up to date with sleek, modern touches and minimalist elements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Home Town: A Little Rough, a Little Refined
programme.desc: Caroline and her husband, Corey, are moving home to follow her dream of opening a men's store. With a budget of $150,000, they're hoping to find a house that matches their authentic, early-century style and has an office worthy of their new business.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Termite Terror
programme.desc: A single woman misses small town life and looks to make a fresh start in a historic home. Ben and Erin come up with big plans to update her home, but they encounter an unexpected problem that could derail the entire renovation.

programme.title: Home Town: Fire and Water
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a house where they can entertain friends in a walkable neighborhood. Ben and Erin give their pick a complete facelift by adding a coastal color scheme, built-in banquet and a back patio that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Snapped: Minnie Salinas
programme.desc: Police race for answers after an adored school teacher is found dead in her San Antonio apartment. A string of lies and betrayal comes to light, but when the case goes cold, one detective refuses to give up.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Banister
programme.desc: When two sisters' husbands turn up dead within weeks of each other, Florida detectives investigate whether the cases are a tragic coincidence or if they're related by something other than blood.

programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder
programme.desc: When a brilliant scientist and devoted family man is found beaten to death, the evidence leads police to make arrests, but an astounding revelation turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Intentions
programme.desc: When a devoted mother about to embark on a new life is murdered in her own home, detectives follow the evidence through a tangled web of relationships to unmask a killer no one could have predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: When a loving father and beloved basketball coach is ruthlessly murdered in Tennessee, police decode a confusing array of evidence to unveil a killer who is shockingly close to home.

programme.desc: A case that could be a hit-and-run murder or an abused woman or woman scorned.

programme.title: Snapped: Tyonne Palmer
programme.desc: A love triangle between a preacher, his son and his girlfriend ends in death.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Goldfinger Mystery

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the surface of an ocean near Antarctica, sparking rumors of a mythological sea monster. An area of the US-Mexico border becomes an international mystery. Ancient rock carvings in a mountain range depict weird, unearthly beings.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for El Dorado
programme.desc: Strange images from the jungles of Colombia could lead researchers to the legendary city of El Dorado. A bright green swirling spiral appears in the seas of the Persian Gulf. A massive complex suddenly appears secretive state of Myanmar.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Relic of Mystery
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare teams up with a Midwestern history enthusiast to investigate a mysterious relic that could be evidence of Viking settlement in America centuries before Columbus, but some think it's a hoax.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Curses and Ghosts
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard investigate the man accused of forging evidence of Vikings in America, testing a crucial piece of evidence with DNA analysis: an ancient skull that may have alien origins.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Mysteries in the Vault
programme.desc: Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard must help a forensic geologist who informs them of new, advanced testing that could verify the authenticity of the runestone, but a new challenge might put their investigation in jeopardy.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Discovery on the Edge
programme.desc: Bringing scholars and skeptics together to solve the mystery of the Kensington Runestone.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police struggle to find a vicious killer despite having DNA evidence and a videotape of the suspect.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: What My Mother Knew
programme.desc: Every week Janine Sutphen went to symphony practice. One night, she didn't come home. Her husband reveals to police there's more to this housewife than anyone knew. But very quickly a secret comes out- leading investigators down a dark, twisted path.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. When the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession
programme.desc: Melissa Atkin is found bound and murdered in her home in Smyrna, Tennessee. Eventually, the investigation focuses in on two individuals, with a series of recorded phone calls proving vital in exonerating one of them, whilst incriminating the other.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: discovery+ 1st Look: Come Home Carlie
programme.desc: February 1st 2004. 11-year-old Carlie Brucia disappears while walking home from a friend's house. Police discover security camera footage of her shocking abduction and the inquiry becomes a manhunt.

programme.title: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: A video-game player finds a nefarious new way to achieve internet fame.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: discovery+ 1st Look: Come Home Carlie

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: She Was Gone
programme.desc: Three months after high school sweethearts, Lisa and Jimmy Moore, end their marriage, Lisa disappears. Fearing the worst, her family file a missing person report, but the police have no leads, no witnesses, but they do know that someone is lying.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Wicked Attraction: The Power of Love
programme.desc: Former childhood sweethearts, Jason and Missy, planned to kill Missy's elderly lover and inherit millions, but their plan quickly spiralled out of control.

programme.title: Love Kills: We Were Like Fire
programme.desc: When Judy and Duane meet, they both long for excitement and to escape the lives they live. Turns out, fate as more in store for them than they desire.

programme.title: Behind Mansion Walls: Kill for Cash
programme.desc: There aren't many downsides to being a millionaire. But one crime is inflicted exclusively on the rich – extortion. The extortionist is often someone from the victim's own inner circle. A friend of relative is more than willing to kill for cash.

programme.title: Behind Mansion Walls: Hidden Desires
programme.desc: Following two grisly murders, the perfect worlds of family men came crumbling down, revealing a life of scandal, debauchery and deceit.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: The DC Mansion Murders
programme.desc: In one of the most exclusive neighborhoods in Washington, DC, police discover a gruesome murder scene amongst the charred ruins of a mansion.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Thorny Rose of Texas
programme.desc: Buddy Musso lives a simple life at a New Jersey retirement community, but he longs for romance. When Buddy meets Suzanne Basso at a fair, love takes him to Texas where a house full of strangers quickly turns his hopeful dreams into a waking nightmare.

programme.title: I Witness: Mother Undercover
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, Carol Bushard's adopted son, Andy Bushard, mysteriously disappears. When police fail to act, Carol and her husband blaze their own investigative trail through the criminal back woods of a California mountain town.

programme.title: The Killer Closer: Deadly Dessert
programme.desc: Detective Lindy Gligorijevic handles a baffling case after a man opens fire on a ninja who broke into his home. As she unravels the events that led up to the shooting, it becomes a race to arrest the would-be killer before they finish the job.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is

programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.
